title: Anthropic Launched Claude Fable 5 On The Claude API
summary: Anthropic's Claude Platform release notes list Claude Fable 5 on the Claude API with the claude-fable-5 model id, a default 1M token context window, 128k maximum output tokens, and always-on adaptive thinking.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official release notes reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate model access, latency, pricing, context-window behavior, and routing fallbacks before adding claude-fable-5 to production allowlists.
Update max-context and max-output assumptions in gateways, SDK validators, and agent harnesses before exposing the new model to users.

detail.migration_notes: This event records Claude API availability and listed model limits. APW does not assert account eligibility, effective per-account quotas, pricing, or quality fit without separate review.

limitations: The reviewed source page is client-rendered; APW stores only the URL, selector, snapshot hash, and factual normalized metadata.
Model access, price, and rate limits may vary by account or platform contract.
